updates.prompt: Now, see, I think you're misunderstanding, fam. It's not supposed to be the quantum computer hooked up to the wrestlers and the wrestler AI. The quantum computer is supposed to be hooked up to the builder and the engine...
updates.action_taken: Acknowledged massive correction. Rerouted the Quantum API and J-Space scratchpad away from in-game wrestler AI, and hooked it directly into the Living Nexus Builder (God-Mode OS). It is now a development loop tool for silent reasoning, complex math offloading (like inverse kinematics), and architecture planning before outputting C++ code.
